creator: mkrzewicki@gmail.com
text:
Hi, I had some time to look further and devise a better fix (against 14.2-RELEASE). It seems pf_purge_expired_src_nodes(void) asserts the src_node_lock and it was called with only the hashrow lock there. Added locking in following patch:
https://github.com/mkrzewic/freebsd-src/commit/464b5b9e787fa972ea65bae58a277995e75151d0
